name: Court of the Seven-Headed Serpent
special_rules: Seven Deadly Sins: Before recruiting, choose a Sin: Wrath, Envy, Lust, Pride, Sloth, Gluttony, or Greed. This determines available Goetic Powers and Desecrated Saint aura.

Goetic Powers: ELITE models can have Goetic Powers (number per Warband Entry). Powers are Abilities (passive) or Spells (cast by spending Blood Markers from any non-BLACK GRAIL/DEMONIC model on battlefield).
Cast Spell ACTION: Can use multiple times per activation, but cannot cast same spell twice. Cost paid in Blood Markers.
Leader: Must include either a Praetor or a Sorcerer (can have both).
Wretched Limit: Number of Wretched must be less than models with DEMONIC keyword.

sin_selection.description: Choose one Sin for the warband. This unlocks Sin-specific Goetic Powers and determines the Desecrated Saint's aura.

abilities: Must include Praetor OR Sorcerer (can have both).
Can be leader if no Praetor.
Blessing of the Serpent Moon: Free built-in spell (Cost 2/4/6). Before Injury Roll on self, add -1 INJURY MODIFIER per 2 Blood Markers paid.
elites.battlekit_notes: Cannot have Ranged Weapons or Grenades.

abilities: Bow of Lethe: 1-Handed, 24", ASSAULT. Before Injury Roll choose +2 INJURY DICE or IGNORE ARMOUR.
Left-Hand Path: Free spell (Cost 2). Teleport to another terrain piece during move/charge.
Oracle Beast Cloak: Free spell (Cost 3, 1/Turn). Change Injury Roll result to No Effect.
Shadow-walker: Free spell (Cost 2). Retreat without enemy Melee Attacks.
elites.battlekit_notes: Must always hold Bow. Cannot have 2-Handed Weapons.

abilities: Blood Magic: Free built-in spell (Cost 1). Before Injury Rolls, add +1 INJURY DICE to all rolls for the attack.
Law of Hell: If kills enemy ELITE, Wretched is freed and removed from game/roster.
troops.battlekit_notes: Can only have Battlekit costing up to 10d. Must have at least 1 Weapon. Count must be less than DEMONIC models.

abilities: Poison Stingers: Melee Attack with CLEAVE 2 and SHRAPNEL keywords.
Pit Locusts cannot retreat from melee.
troops.battlekit_notes: Can only have Crown of Hellfire. No other Battlekit.

abilities: Hateful: Must charge nearest visible non-DEMONIC/BLACK GRAIL enemy within 12" if more than 1" away. Negated by Restraining Muzzle.
Torturer: Melee Attacks can target friendly Wretched within 1" to generate Blood Markers for spellcasting.
troops.battlekit_notes: Can have 1 Ranged Weapon costing 30d or less. Can have other Battlekit except additional Ranged Weapons.

abilities: Annihilator: Can take 1 Fight ACTION per activation. Each Fight ACTION attacks with CLEAVE 3.
Demonic Aura: Has one aura based on warband's Sin (see sin_auras below).
troops.battlekit_notes: Can have up to 3 Weapons (all count as 1-Handed). Cannot have any other Battlekit.

desecrated_saint_auras.Wrath: Aura of Wrath: +1 DICE to Melee Attacks made by friendly THE COURT models within 6".
desecrated_saint_auras.Envy: Aura of Envy: Enemy models within 12" cannot use Keywords or special rules (except DEMONIC, BLACK GRAIL, movement, and Morale). Choose to negate.
desecrated_saint_auras.Lust: Aura of Lust: Enemy within 4" at start of their activation must pass Risky Roll or activation ends immediately.
desecrated_saint_auras.Pride: Aura of Pride: Place 1 Blood Marker next to each enemy model within 6" that is activated while within range.
desecrated_saint_auras.Sloth: Aura of Sloth: Enemy within 8" treat all terrain as DIFFICULT TERRAIN.
desecrated_saint_auras.Gluttony: Aura of Gluttony: -1 DICE to enemy Ranged Attacks targeting friendly models within 6" of Desecrated Saint.
desecrated_saint_auras.Greed: Aura of Greed: Enemy within 12" must pass Risky Roll before retreating or retreat fails.

Universal.name: Burning Inferno
Universal.effect: Cast Spell ACTION. Ranged Attack 36", BLAST X" (X = Blood Markers paid), FIRE, SCATTER. IGNORE ARMOUR on direct hit.

Universal.name: Slavemaster
Universal.effect: Cast during Yoke Fiend activation within 18". Issue commands: Charge, Fight, Move, Shoot, Sacrifice.

Wrath.name: Charge of Hatred
Wrath.effect: Charge ignores terrain penalties. Must charge in straight line.

Wrath.name: Lesser Mark of Cain
Wrath.effect: Model has IGNORE ARMOUR for Melee Attacks.

Envy.name: Coveted Position
Envy.effect: Cast Spell ACTION. Swap positions with model within 12" in LoS and 1"+ from others.

Envy.name: Envious Eyes
Envy.effect: At start of game, pick 1 enemy model. +1 DICE to attacks targeting that model.

Envy.name: What is Yours is Mine
Envy.effect: Transfer 1 Blessing Marker from any model to spellcaster or friendly within 6".

Lust.name: Call of the Flesh
Lust.effect: Cast Spell ACTION. Next enemy activated must move toward spellcaster instead of normal actions.

Lust.name: Exquisite Pain
Lust.effect: Place Blood Markers paid onto target model in LoS (friend or foe).

Lust.name: Forbidden Pleasures
Lust.effect: Per model with this ability, pick 1 non-DEMONIC friendly. That model has -1 DICE to Morale Checks but +1 DICE to all other rolls.

Pride.name: Light of Samael
Pride.effect: Cast Spell ACTION. Injury Roll on enemy within 24" in LoS. +2 INJURY DICE if on base larger than 32mm.

Pride.name: Proud Defiance
Pride.effect: No Morale Checks if warband has 1+ model with this ability.

Pride.name: Too Proud to Fall
Pride.effect: Cast when spellcaster goes Down. Ignore Down result, remain standing (still takes Blood Markers).

Sloth.name: Charm of Acedia
Sloth.effect: Cast Spell ACTION. Pick enemy within 12" in LoS. Enemy cannot take Dash, Charge, or Retreat until next activation.

Sloth.name: Daemonium Meridianum
Sloth.effect: 8" aura around this model counts as DIFFICULT TERRAIN for enemies.

Sloth.name: Morphean Mind
Sloth.effect: Opponent cannot spend more than 1 Blood Marker for -DICE on this model's Success Rolls.

Gluttony.name: Belly of the Beast
Gluttony.effect: When this model takes a Blood Marker, place 1 additional Blood Marker on nearest enemy within 6".

Gluttony.name: Eater of the Flesh
Gluttony.effect: After Melee Attack, remove Blood Markers from self equal to those placed on target.

Gluttony.name: Uncaring Gluttony
Gluttony.effect: Cast when friendly DEMONIC model would go OoA. Change result to Down instead.

Greed.name: Black Heart
Greed.effect: Cast before Success Roll. Add +1 DICE to the roll.

Greed.name: Body of Gold
Greed.effect: Model gains GOLEM keyword. Loses TOUGH and cannot gain it.

Greed.name: Greedy Hearts
Greed.effect: If warband has 1+ model with this ability, add +1 DICE to all Exploration rolls in campaign.
